Hero.name: Hamidreza Fallahi
Hero.tagline: Building fast, scalable and SEO-friendly user interfaces
Hero.description: I focus on frontend development with React, Next.js and TypeScript. I have experience building admin panels, ERP systems, online stores and production-grade web applications. My goal is to create products that are strong in user experience as well as reliable in architecture, maintainability and SEO.

experience.subtitle: Years of Professional Experience
experience.description: Frontend development for real-world projects used in production environments

projects.subtitle: Real Projects
projects.description: From organizational panels and ERP to online stores and custom web applications

technical.title: SEO + Performance
technical.subtitle: Technical Focus
technical.description: Building fast, optimized and maintainable user interfaces with modern architecture

About.title: Frontend Development with focus on scalability, user experience and code quality
About.paragraph1: I am passionate about building clean, fast and maintainable user interfaces; especially in projects that require proper architecture, reusable components and long-term maintainability.
About.paragraph2: My experience is mainly in developing management panels, ERP systems, online stores and web applications based on Next.js and TypeScript. In addition to implementing UI, I pay special attention to performance, accessibility, SEO and developer experience.
About.paragraph3: If you are looking for a developer who doesn't just implement the appearance but also thinks about structure, stability and product quality, I would be happy to collaborate.

Projects.title: Projects that show how I think and build
Projects.subtitle: My focus is not just on implementing the UI; I work on building frontends that are reliable in structure, performance and user experience.

erp.title: Enterprise ERP Dashboard
erp.description: Design and development of user interface for ERP system including dynamic forms, workflow, access levels, reporting and extensible architecture.

ecommerce.title: SEO-Driven E-Commerce Platform
ecommerce.description: Implementation of online store with focus on performance, SEO, smooth shopping experience and connection to ASP.NET Core backend.

designSystem.title: Admin Panel Design System
designSystem.description: Building component-based structure for management panel with the aim of increasing development speed, UI consistency and reducing code duplication.
designSystem.tags: React, TypeScript, Design System, Reusable Components
